base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of hud_action_icons — a ui from 1986 dragon quest. Small action-icons row — run / attack / spell / item / examine / save icons. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Small action-icons row — run / attack / spell / item / examine / save icons; mini-buttons for touch UI
